title: ThaiConjugationLesson
description: A schema for a Thai conjugation lesson.

title.description: The title of the lesson in English.

conjugation_rule_name.description: The name of the conjugation rule in English.

explanation.description: A clear explanation of the conjugation rule, allowing both English and Thai characters.

infinitive.description: The base form of the word in Thai.

conjugated_form.description: The word after conjugation in Thai.

example_sentence.description: A full sentence in Thai using the conjugated form.

sentence_translation.description: The English translation of the example sentence.
